title: Falrey
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Falrey.png]] |name=Falrey |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=faction|Imperial|Get Information From Station Gamma|Tansarii Point Station}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Red |feathers= |eyes=Green |skin=Fair |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Agent Falrey looks mysterious. I want to check that out.|A spacer, to [[Inaldra/Legends|Inaldra's]] [[Inaldra's Lieutenant|Lieutenant]]|{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Speak to Inaldra's Lieutenant to Get Work|Tansarii Point Station}}}} '''Falrey''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Imperial officer|officer]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Are you an Imperial Officer?''"
"''Not enough of a disguise? No matter. You are a loyal citizen of the Empire, are you not? My senior officer, Captain Thrawn, has a mission of the utmost importance.|A spacer and Agent Falrey|}} After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Agent/Legends|Agent]] Falrey served a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] under the orders of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. During that time, the Empire had an arrangement with the [[Rak'qua]], an aggressive tribe of [[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolans]] living in [[Station Gamma]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] above [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. The Rak'qua had allowed the Empire to set up a communication system in Station Gamma. However, In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],{{SWG_timeline}} the Nautolans had decided to put a lock on the Imperial communication system, preventing the Empire from communicating with its main [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] in the region. Captain Thrawn therefore tasked Falrey to investigate the situation. The Imperial Agent traveled to [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a space station neighboring Station Gamma in the Bright Jewel system where he recruited a group of spacers loyal to the Empire. The spacers raided Station Gamma, killing a number of hostile Rak'qua during the attack, and successfully [[Slicer/Legends|sliced]] the Station Gamma [[Memory bank/Legends|databank]]. The spacers then returned safely to Tansarii Point Station and delivered the information to Agent Falrey. ==Behind the scenes== Falrey appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}} Falrey was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]," introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}} ==Appearances== *{{GalaxiesNGE}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki|Get Information From Station Gamma}} [[Category:Agents of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Officers of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Spies]]
